ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general chocolate beverage class; no specific 'iced chocolate' subclass exists. Closest parent match used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0FKP covers chocolate-based beverages broadly; no iced-specific subcode available. Closest parent match used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No specific SNOMED CT code identified for iced chocolate beverage; left null to preserve ontology honesty.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard serving is approximately 300 g (one glass), providing about 126 kcal, 31 g carbohydrate, and 29.8 g sugar.

nutrient_source.title: Signature Iced Chocolate — HPB Singapore Foodo nutrient record G00010288
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values taken directly from HPB Singapore Foodo record G00010288 for Signature Iced Chocolate. All per-100g values preserved as reported. Saturated fat, monounsaturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, trans fat, and several micronutrients are not reported in the HPB record and are set to -1.

gi_source.title: Chocolate-flavoured milk drink, GI approximately 34–64 range; sweetened chocolate beverage analogous estimate
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for 'Signature Iced Chocolate' in the University of Sydney GI Database. The closest analogous food is a sweetened chocolate milk-based beverage (GI ~60, medium category) as reported in the University of Sydney GI Database for chocolate-flavoured milk drinks. GL per serving calculated as: GI (60) × carbohydrate per serving (31.08 g from 300 g serving) / 100 = 18.6. This is an analogous estimate; direct measurement is recommended.

hypertension.key_factor: High sugar content (9.94 g/100 g) in a sweetened beverage independently elevates blood pressure risk; sodium is low at 3 mg/100 g but sugar-driven BP elevation is clinically significant per AHA 2018 guidance.
hypertension.guidance: Individuals managing hypertension should avoid or strictly limit sweetened chocolate beverages, as the 9.94 g/100 g sugar load independently raises blood pressure risk regardless of the low sodium content; request an unsweetened or reduced-sugar version.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Sugar-sweetened beverage with 9.94 g sugar/100 g and zero dietary fibre; liquid sugar is absorbed rapidly, causing acute postprandial blood glucose elevation with no fibre buffering.
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid this beverage entirely due to its high free-sugar content (9.94 g/100 g) and zero fibre, which together produce rapid postprandial glycaemic spikes; unsweetened cocoa with low-fat milk is a safer alternative.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High free-sugar content (9.94 g/100 g) with zero fibre and negligible potassium (5 mg/100 g); regular consumption of sugar-sweetened beverages is independently associated with increased CVD risk via triglyceride elevation and endothelial dysfunction.
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit or avoid this sweetened iced chocolate, as its high free-sugar load (9.94 g/100 g) with zero fibre is associated with elevated triglycerides and increased CVD risk; choose unsweetened cocoa preparations instead.

rheumatoid_arthritis.key_factor: High sugar (9.94 g/100 g) with zero fibre and no clinically relevant anti-inflammatory nutrients; sugar promotes pro-inflammatory mediators.
rheumatoid_arthritis.guidance: People with rheumatoid arthritis should avoid this sweetened iced chocolate as its high sugar content and absence of anti-inflammatory factors (omega-3, polyphenols, fibre) may promote systemic inflammation; an unsweetened dark cocoa preparation would be preferable.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Signature Iced Chocolate is a European-style sweetened cold chocolate beverage served in Singapore café settings. It is prepared by blending chocolate syrup with chilled milk or water over ice, then finished with a dusting of cocoa powder on top. The drink is served without whipped cream, keeping the calorie profile lower than cream-topped variants. The texture is smooth and liquid, with a rich chocolate flavour balanced by sweetness from the chocolate syrup. Per 100 g, it provides 42 kcal, 10.36 g carbohydrate (of which 9.94 g is sugar), 0.25 g fat, and negligible protein (0 g confirmed per HPB record). Dietary fibre is zero, meaning there is no buffering of the rapid sugar absorption. Sodium is very low at 3 mg/100 g. The beverage is classified as a sugar-sweetened beverage (SSB) due to its free-sugar content exceeding 5 g/100 g. Clinically, it is unsuitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, or cardiovascular disease due to its high free-sugar load and absence of fibre. The glycaemic index is estimated at approximately 60 (medium) based on analogous sweetened chocolate milk beverages from the University of Sydney GI Database, with a glycaemic load of approximately 18.6 per 300 g serving. It is vegetarian and halal-suitable but not vegan due to milk content. Common serving context is as a snack or teatime beverage in Western-style cafés in Singapore.
common_user_queries: How much sugar is in iced chocolate?
Is Signature Iced Chocolate suitable for hypertension?
What is the calorie count of iced chocolate?
Is iced chocolate a sugar-sweetened beverage?
What is the GI of iced chocolate?

confidence_reason: Nutrient values sourced directly from HPB Singapore Foodo record G00010288 (exact match, confidence 0.95 per source metadata). GI is an analogous estimate from the University of Sydney GI Database and is clearly documented as such. Local-language names for Chinese, Malay, Tamil, and Hindi are translational equivalents of the English name, appropriate for a Western café beverage served in Singapore's multilingual context.
notes: protein_g is confirmed zero per HPB Singapore Foodo record G00010288; this is a predominantly carbohydrate-sugar beverage with negligible protein by formulation — confirmed zero. dietary_fibre_g is confirmed zero per HPB record. cholesterol_mg is confirmed zero per HPB record. magnesium_mg is confirmed zero per HPB record. saturated_fat_g, monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g set to -1: detailed fatty acid breakdown not reported in HPB Foodo record G00010288 for this beverage. vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, water_g set to -1: these micronutrients and water content are not reported in the HPB Foodo record for this item. The food_subgroup in the input JSON was listed as 'Cakes' which appears to be a data entry error; this record is clearly a beverage and has been reclassified to food_group 'Beverages' and food_subgroup 'Chocolate beverages — sweetened, iced'. GI of 60 is an analogous estimate based on sweetened chocolate milk beverages from the University of Sydney GI Database; direct measurement for this specific product is recommended. This is a Western-cuisine beverage served in Singapore; multilingual local-language names (Chinese: 招牌冰巧克力, Malay: Coklat Ais Istimewa, Tamil: சிறப்பு ஐஸ் சாக்லேட், Hindi: सिग्नेचर आइस्ड चॉकलेट) are translational equivalents provided to satisfy G6 multilingual naming compliance for a food served in Singapore's multilingual context, even though this is a Western-origin beverage with no traditional local-language name.

improvement_actions_taken: Iteration 1: Initial draft produced with HPB source data, GI analogous estimate, and health context.
Iteration 2: Corrected ontology match types from 'approximate' to 'closest_parent' for FoodOn and FoodEx2.

Iteration 3: Added mandatory local-language names for Chinese (招牌冰巧克力), Malay (Coklat Ais Istimewa), Tamil (சிறப்பு ஐஸ் சாக்லேட்), and Hindi (सिग्नेचर आइस्ड चॉकलेट) to local_names and aliases_by_language. Added all four local-language strings to flat aliases array. This resolves G6 multilingual naming compliance failure and Q1/Q8 failures from iteration 2 validator feedback.
veritas_qc.reviewer_summary: PASS — all hard gates passed and the record scored 8/8.
